data.name: FeedingService.BusinessRuleError
data.value: The feeding operation could not be completed.

data.name: FeedingService.CancelledCannotBePosted
data.value: A cancelled feeding record cannot be posted to ERP.

data.name: FeedingService.MustContainDistributedLines
data.value: Feeding lines must have cage distributions before creating an ERP warehouse issue.

data.name: FeedingService.StockCodeRequired
data.value: Feed stock code is required for the ERP warehouse issue.

data.name: FeedingService.InvalidFeedQuantity
data.value: Feed quantity must be greater than 0 for the ERP warehouse issue.

data.name: FeedingService.WarehouseMappingRequired
data.value: No active ERP warehouse mapping was found for cage {0}.

data.name: FeedingService.FeedWarehouseRequired
data.value: No ERP issue warehouse was found for feed stock {0}. Check the feed goods receipt warehouse or the default ERP warehouse setting.

data.name: FeedingLineService.HeaderNotFoundRetryWithProject
data.value: Feeding header not found. Please try again by selecting a project.

data.name: FeedingLineService.PositiveValuesRequired
data.value: Quantity, gram per unit, and total gram must be greater than 0 in the feeding line.

data.name: FeedingLineService.HeaderCreateRetryForToday
data.value: Feeding header not found. Try creating a new project-based header for today again.

data.name: FeedingLineService.SaveFailed
data.value: An error occurred while saving the feeding line.
